title: App Settings - General - Licenses
scenario: Third-party Software licenses with Source and License links are visible under App Settings > General > Licenses and match those in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements
steps: Verify a list of licenses is displayed
For each license entry, verify that a 'Source' link is visible
For each license entry, verify that a 'License' link is visible
Verify that the same licenses listed in the app are also present here
expected: The 'Third-party Software' headline is visible with a list of licenses. Each license displays both a Source link and a License link. The same licenses are also present in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
